pages.text: Now reinfused with pure fire, this key is ready to melt your opponents down!$(br2)$(3)$(l)Special:$() Increases fire spell power and resistance (when Iron's Spells and Spellbooks is installed) and burns enemies for 10 seconds.
Combine an Ancient Vault Opener and a Blaze Rod in a Totem Lathe.
Upgrade your Ancient Vault Opener with Timeless Slurry and a Pyrium Ingot in a smithing table.
